textEn: And when the stars fall, scattering,
And when the seas are erupted
And when the [contents of] graves are scattered [i.e., exposed],
A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back.

textAr: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
textEn: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous,
textTranslit: Yaaa ayyuhal insaaanu maa gharraka bi Rabbikal kareem

textEn: Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you?

textAr: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
textEn: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you.
textTranslit: Feee ayye sooratim maa shaaa'a rakkabak

textEn: No! But you deny the Recompense.
And indeed, [appointed] over you are keepers,
Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure,
And indeed, the wicked will be in Hellfire.
They will [enter to] burn therein on the Day of Recompense,
And never therefrom will they be absent.
And what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?
textTranslit: Wa maaa adraaka maa Yawmud Deen

textAr: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
textEn: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?
textTranslit: Summa maaa adraaka maa Yawmud Deen

textAr: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِّنَفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا ۖ وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلَّهِ
textEn: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allāh.
textTranslit: Yawma laa tamliku nafsul linafsin shai'anw walamru yawma'izil lillaah
